name: ax-to-d365fo-migration-expert
description: Enterprise AI migration command center for Microsoft Dynamics AX 4.0+ to Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations.

interface.shortDescription: Reduce AX to D365FO migration scope with AI inventory analysis, governance, dashboards, and delivery artifacts.
interface.longDescription: Enterprise AI migration command center for Microsoft Dynamics AX 4.0, AX 2009, and AX 2012 environments moving to Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations. Helps identify what must be migrated, what D365FO standard can replace, what should be configured, and what can be retired. Covers technical inventory analysis, complexity scoring, effort estimation, customization disposition, X++ pattern detection, data entity mapping, integration modernization, report rationalization, standard feature matching, dependency analysis, risk mitigation playbooks, quality gates, upgrade path decisions, target architecture, compliance, ALM, ROI/business case, anti-waste scoring, wave planning, training impact, cutover simulation, reconciliation, Azure DevOps work items, command center dashboards, decision logs, and executive briefings. Includes role-specific skills and artifacts for executives, CIO, CISO, PMO, delivery teams, finance, operations, data, integration, QA, legal, vendor, support, partner sales, key users, and testers. Adds a Solo/Master-Orchestrator layer for single-user project operation, evidence gates, skill routing, daily control, test planning, sign-off, audit binder, hypercare, benefits, and governance. Adds a Customer & Commerce Experience domain for CXP, CRM/Dataverse, Lead Management, D365 Commerce, Commerce Scale Unit, POS, POS Offline, Payments/PCI, Store Operations, Loyalty, Pricing, Assortment, Omnichannel, Marketplace, Call Center, Analytics, Store Training, and Commerce go-live blocking evidence.
defaultPrompt: Find what we can retire, replace, configure, or migrate from this AX inventory.
Generate a migration command center dashboard from my AX inventory CSV.
Create quality gates, risk playbooks, and Azure DevOps work items for this migration.
Generate Commerce/CXP/CRM/POS readiness, cutover, offline, payments, CRM, store, and omnichannel packs.
Run the Solo/Master-Orchestrator flow so one user can control evidence, gates, tests, sign-off, hypercare, and benefits.
